pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 features and Jakarta EE.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; targeting 1.8 prevents use of Java 21 features and may cause compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer Java.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from mysql-connector-j to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Upgrade modelmapper from 3.2.0 to 3.2.6 for bug fixes and improvements.
Upgrade lombok from 1.18.32 to 1.18.46 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Replace javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api with jakarta.xml.bind:jakarta.xml.bind-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; code using JAXB will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAXB implementation at runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB API alone is insufficient; an implementation is required at runtime for JAXB operations to function.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to replace javax.mail for Jakarta EE compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; code using JavaMail will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from log4j-core to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit version from log4j-api to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit version from jackson-annotations to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit version from jackson-core to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Remove explicit version from jackson-databind to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to align with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Apache HttpClient 4.x is deprecated and may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21; HttpClient 5.x is the supported version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace commons-lang 2.x with commons-lang3 to align with modern Apache Commons library.
pom.xml.why_exists: commons-lang 2.x is deprecated and may have compatibility issues with modern libraries; commons-lang3 is the supported version.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.why_exists: The Locale(String, String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and relying on deprecated APIs causes compilation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings; the new API is the standard replacement.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated method-based DSL to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.why_exists: The methods `authorizeRequests()`, `antMatchers()`, and the old `formLogin()`/`logout()` chaining syntax are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time error (package not found) on the target JDK/runtime.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Artist..general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE namespace jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Artist..why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 stacks), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field for Java 14+ serialization best practices.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Lyrics..why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Role.ja.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Song.ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/SongRec.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Tag.jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Tag.jav.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/User.ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/User.ja.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or a compile error if the old API jar is not present.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/StringUt.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/HomePage..general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client imports from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.why_exists: The old `org.apache.http` classes are removed or incompatible with the new Spring Boot 3/Java 21 stack which uses `org.apache.hc.client5` and `org.apache.hc.core5`.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.general_idea: Update status code retrieval to use HC5 API `getCode()` instead of `getStatusLine().getStatusCode()`.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.why_exists: The `getStatusLine()` method is removed or changed in HttpClient 5; `getCode()` is the new standard accessor for the status code.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.general_idea: Replace deprecated Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern API usage.
Replace legacy List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21 for clearer intent.

Replace Paths.get with Path.of introduced in Java 11.
Remove unused import for java.nio.file.Paths after replacing Paths.get with Path.of.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
